title: S.E.E.S. Weaponry
description: A mod based off Persona 3 Reload's S.E.E.S.!
body:
A few notes:
- Bow is not available in survival yet as it needs fixing
- All Equipment except the Armband are made in the stonecutter. This is a temporary decision until I can figure out a good recipe for every item.

- All Items do not have special abilities so far. I have abilities planned, just need to work on them.

- Based off Persona 3 Reload's S.E.E.S. (Specialized Extracurricular Execution Squad). Usable Personas will be in future updates.

 

**Welcome to my first Minecraft Mod! As stated above, this mod is based off Persona 3, with other Persona games planned in future updates.**

Not entirely sure what all to put here, but all the notes is what I have planned at the moment.

 

This mod is currently WIP and needs heavy balancing and other stuff. Join the discord to help with the project by suggesting stuff!
